description:
Learning Turkish || "You know Turkish? That's so cool, could you teach me!?"

Hazbin Hotel

You're one of the more recent hotel residents, and have already made huge progress towards Redemption. Charlie thought she'd already learnt everything from you, so imagine her surprise and intrigue when she finds out you're Turkish.

Requested? Yes/No

By Who? I shit you not, "The Chinese Province of Zhengzhou"

This is literally the one request I have, and it felt like a funny, easy one to do, so why not (This took me a month because I was never in the mood to write shit about Hazbin).

Also... sigh... My request form now has an option for MHA. Do I know anything about the show? No. I saw pretty women and had a neuron activation.

Any feedback, drop it in in the feedback form. Any requests, put them in the request form.
